testimonials.text: The whole collaboration was smooth and easy from start to finish.

translations.en: The whole collaboration was smooth and easy from start to finish.
translations.de: Die Zusammenarbeit war von Anfang bis Ende reibungslos und unkompliziert.
translations.bg: Сътрудничеството беше гладко и лесно от началото до края.

testimonials.author: Jonathan T.

testimonials.text: Working with Stanimir was a real pleasure; professional and easy to work with.

translations.en: Working with Stanimir was a real pleasure; professional and easy to work with.
translations.de: Die Zusammenarbeit mit Stanimir war eine echte Freude - professionell und angenehm.
translations.bg: Работата със Станимир беше истинско удоволствие - професионална и лесна.

testimonials.author: Mahmood V.

testimonials.text: Stanimir delivered our software project on time with strong quality and quickly understood the requirements. Communication was efficient and professional, and we'd gladly work with him again.

translations.en: Stanimir delivered our software project on time with strong quality and quickly understood the requirements. Communication was efficient and professional, and we'd gladly work with him again.
translations.de: Stanimir hat unser Softwareprojekt pünktlich und in hoher Qualität geliefert und die Anforderungen schnell verstanden. Die Kommunikation war effizient und professionell, und wir würden jederzeit wieder mit ihm zusammenarbeiten.
translations.bg: Станимир достави софтуерния ни проект навреме и с високо качество, като бързо разбра изискванията. Комуникацията беше ефективна и професионална и с удоволствие бихме работили отново с него.

testimonials.author: Alex S.

testimonials.text: Stanimir consistently delivered reliable, high-quality work with a structured and efficient approach. He was dependable, team-oriented, and performed to our full satisfaction.

translations.en: Stanimir consistently delivered reliable, high-quality work with a structured and efficient approach. He was dependable, team-oriented, and performed to our full satisfaction.
translations.de: Stanimir lieferte konstant zuverlässige, hochwertige Ergebnisse mit strukturierter und effizienter Arbeitsweise. Er war verlässlich, teamorientiert und erfüllte unsere Erwartungen voll.
translations.bg: Станимир постоянно предоставяше надеждни и качествени резултати със структуриран и ефективен подход. Той беше надежден, екипен и напълно оправда очакванията ни.

testimonials.author: D. Crowder

testimonials.text: He showed solid technical expertise and solved issues quickly in our software systems. He worked independently, handled pressure well, and was a strong team contributor.

translations.en: He showed solid technical expertise and solved issues quickly in our software systems. He worked independently, handled pressure well, and was a strong team contributor.
translations.de: Er zeigte starke technische Kompetenz und löste Probleme in unseren Softwaresystemen schnell. Er arbeitete selbstständig, blieb auch unter Druck souverän und war ein wertvoller Teamplayer.
translations.bg: Той показа силна техническа експертиза и решаваше бързо проблеми в нашите софтуерни системи. Работеше самостоятелно, справяше се добре под напрежение и беше ценен екипен играч.

testimonials.author: J. Wronna

testimonials.text: Stanimir improved key C# processes while keeping existing functionality stable and reliable. His SQL and full-stack skills made him highly effective for both optimization and new development.

translations.en: Stanimir improved key C# processes while keeping existing functionality stable and reliable. His SQL and full-stack skills made him highly effective for both optimization and new development.
translations.de: Stanimir verbesserte zentrale C#-Prozesse und hielt die bestehende Funktionalität stabil und zuverlässig. Seine SQL- und Full-Stack-Kenntnisse machten ihn sowohl bei Optimierungen als auch bei neuen Entwicklungen äußerst effektiv.
translations.bg: Станимир подобри ключови C# процеси, като запази съществуващата функционалност стабилна и надеждна. Неговите SQL и full-stack умения го направиха изключително ефективен както при оптимизации, така и при нова разработка.

testimonials.author: Todor Todorov
